text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day has come again, and the
academy is wrapped in excitement. But not
everyone is feeling festive...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This day always gets me a little blue...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and it was a total bummer... It was during the
chocolate exchange last year.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make the younger students happy, so
I worked really hard on their gifts.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I tried to impress everyone by making ganache,
which I thought was really poppin' at the time...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so happy, but I didn't realize the
truth until later—the big ganache boom had
already come and gone forever ago!
choice_data_list:
But everybody enjoyed it, so it worked out fine,
right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No, it wasn't fine! I wanted everyone to enjoy the
new hotness!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm always trying to stay on top of the most
tubular trends, so biffing it like that was
mortifying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think Maruzensky being behind the times
is limited to just this case...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't have any chocolate for you,
Trainer. I just couldn't bear something like that
happening again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't have any chocolate for you,
Trainer. I just couldn't bear something like that
happening again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Are you disappointed?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Psych! Just kidding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're always so good to me, so of course I'm
getting you something!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go get you some chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought we were just going to get chocolate,
but it seems we're driving to somewhere I've never
been...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, this is the place!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There are a ton of different shops here, so pick
any chocolate you want!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you pick out your own chocolate, I won't have
to worry about which one is hot right now!
choice_data_list:
You want me to choose my own chocolate? Are
you sure?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you pick out your own chocolate, I won't have
to worry about which one is hot right now!
choice_data_list:
You want me to choose my own chocolate? Are
you sure?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's all good! Just think of it like we're out
shopping together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Don't be shy. Pick whatever you like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I have a great time picking out
chocolate together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: This isn't just any chocolate, I'll have you know. It's a handcrafted, homemade confection!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This way I can show my appreciation without
worrying about what's hot right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was practically bouncing around the room when
I was making it! I kept imagining your happy face
when you eat it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! You're very welcome!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...So, Trainer, where's your shoe cubby?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...So, Trainer, where's your shoe cubby?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know, when you give someone chocolate,
you put it in their shoe cubby, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I made it just the right size to fit! So c'mon, where
is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a pretty old-fashioned way to receive a gift,
but I'm grateful all the same.
